title: Brown and Cream Modern Minimalist Life Lessons Collage Instagram Post

A.A: No one has it figured out, and that’s okay.

You don’t have to dim your light for
people who refuse to see you shine.
Survived the week? Laundry done? That’s growth & power. That’s the main character arc.
Distance doesn’t mean drama. It just means you’re growing in different directions.
Some days you’ll feel brand new, other days you’ll spiral over a 2018 memory. Keep showing up for yourself anyway.
